footer.bio: Business Analyst driving data-informed decisions and delivering strategic insights for modern organizations.

hero.name: Ajwa Asif
hero.title: Business Analyst
hero.tagline: Transforming complex data into clear, actionable insights that drive smarter business decisions.

about.heading: Turning complex data into strategic business value
about.bio1: I'm a Business Analyst with a passion for bridging the gap between data and decision-making. I specialize in translating business requirements into actionable insights, process improvements, and data-driven strategies.
about.bio2: From stakeholder workshops and requirements gathering to dashboard development and KPI reporting, I bring both analytical rigor and clear communication to every engagement. I've contributed to projects across fintech, enterprise SaaS, and operations.
about.bio3: Currently focused on leveraging modern analytics tools and business intelligence platforms to help organizations make faster, smarter decisions.

skills.heading: The stack I work with
skills.subheading: A curated set of tools and frameworks I use to analyze, visualize, and communicate business insights.

projects.heading: Things I've delivered
projects.subheading: A selection of business analysis and data projects spanning process improvement, reporting, and strategic insights.

contact.heading: Let's build something together
contact.subheading: I'm currently open to Business Analyst roles and consulting engagements. Reach out and let's talk.
contact.formSuccess: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
